agribalyse.name_en: Dried sponge cake filled with fruits and covered with chocolate
agribalyse.name_fr: Génoise sèche fourrée aux fruits et nappée de chocolat

ingredients_text: 55 % orange marmalade [glucose-fructose syrup, sugar, 20 % orange juice based on concentrate, gelling agent (e440i), acidifier (e330), natural orange flavoring], 28 % sponge [wheat flour, sugar, eggs, fat of palm, stabilizer (e420ii), glucose-fructose syrup, starch (wheat, tapioca), baking powders (e503ii, e500ii), emulsifier (e471), corrector of acidity (e331i), salt], 17 % chocolate [cocoa mass, sugar, cocoa butter, emulsifier (e322, contains soy), natural flavour vanilla] , may contain traces of milk and nuts,
ingredients_text_en: 55 % orange marmalade [glucose-fructose syrup, sugar, 20 % orange juice based on concentrate, gelling agent (e440i), acidifier (e330), natural orange flavoring], 28 % sponge [wheat flour, sugar, eggs, fat of palm, stabilizer (e420ii), glucose-fructose syrup, starch (wheat, tapioca), baking powders (e503ii, e500ii), emulsifier (e471), corrector of acidity (e331i), salt], 17 % chocolate [cocoa mass, sugar, cocoa butter, emulsifier (e322, contains soy), natural flavour vanilla] , may contain traces of milk and nuts,
ingredients_text_fr: 55 % marmelade à l'orange [sirop de glucose-fructose, sucre, 20 % jus d'orange à base de concentré, gélifiant (E440i), acidifiant (E330), arôme naturel d'orange], 28 % génoise [farine de BLÉ, sucre, CEUFS, graisse de palme, stabilisant (E420ii), sirop de glucose-fructose, amidons (BLÉ, tapioca), poudres à lever (E503ii, E500ii), émulsifiant (E471), correcteur d'acidité (E331i), sel], 17 % chocolat [pâte de cacao, sucre, beurre de cacao, émulsifiant (E322, contient du SOJA), arôme naturel de vanille], PEUT CONTENIR DES TRACES DE LAIT ET DE FRUITS À COQUE,
